notes: HAR-412 captures Admin GraphQL 2026-04 Product.contextualPricing and ProductVariant.contextualPricing for country MX while a disposable product-level fixed price is active on the Mexico Markets price list, then deletes that fixed price and captures cleanup reads. Local parity is captured-read replay only: the proxy preserves hydrated contextualPricing payloads for product and variant reads, but does not synthesize broader contextual pricing from staged price-list writes.
